# Crumb — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A homemade cookie business based in Charlotte, North Carolina, offering a warm and personal baking experience. The business caters to a variety of needs — from single cookie purchases to beautifully curated cookie boxes, fully customized cookie designs, and large-scale orders for events and celebrations. The brand carries a cozy, artisan feel rooted in handcrafted quality and local community.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Discover Crumb in Charlotte—where every cookie is a warm, handcrafted experience. From single treats to stunning crumbl cookie boxes, we bake joy for any moment. Order your box today.

### Services
https://example.com/services
Create your perfect crumbl cookie party box or design fully customized cookies for birthdays, weddings, and celebrations. Explore our services and let&#39;s bake something unforgettable together.

### About
https://example.com/about
Learn the story of Crumb, a Charlotte-based homemade cookie business built on handcrafted quality and community warmth. See why every batch feels like coming home.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Ready for crumbl cookie boxes, custom designs, or a party tray that steals the show? Reach out to Crumb in Charlotte and let&#39;s bring your sweet vision to life.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Crumb
A homemade cookie business based in Charlotte, North Carolina, offering a warm and personal baking experience. The business caters to a variety of needs — from single cookie purchases to beautifully curated cookie boxes, fully customized cookie designs, and large-scale orders for events and celebrations. The brand carries a cozy, artisan feel rooted in handcrafted quality and local community.

## Services/Products
- Individual cookies
- Cookie boxes
- Custom cookies
- Large orders for events

## Target Audience
- Cookie Enthusiasts
- Event Planners
- Gift Shoppers
- Cookie lovers

## Industry
Food & Bakery

---

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
- Products (JSON): https://example.com/products.json
- Products (Google Merchant RSS): https://example.com/product-feed.xml
